meta.purpose: Structured long-tail SEO article database for blogs, how-to guides, comparisons, troubleshooting content, buyer guides, and application guides.

field_definitions.title: Human-readable article title.
field_definitions.content_type: comparison, how_to, troubleshooting, buyer_guide, application_guide, or explainer.
field_definitions.priority: SEO/business priority: P1, P2, or P3.
field_definitions.related_knowledge: Knowledge base pages to internally link.
field_definitions.related_cases: Case study pages to internally link.
